pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to enforce the new baseline.
Convert the project from a single JAR module to a multi-module parent POM structure.
Move dependency declarations from the root <dependencies> block to <dependencyManagement> to allow child modules to define their own usage.
Move plugin configurations from the root <plugins> block to <pluginManagement> to allow child modules to inherit versions without forced execution.
Replace the central-publishing-maven-plugin and manual GPG signing with JReleaser for automated release management.
Update the Instancio library version to 5.3.0.
Update the AssertJ library version to 3.27.3.
Remove unused or commented-out dependencies such as Roaster, ByteBuddy, and various plugin version properties.
pom.xml.human_impl: <!-- removed roaster, byte-buddy, and various plugin version properties -->

pom.xml.general_idea: Move Javadoc plugin configuration from build plugins to the reporting section for site generation.
Add a 'publication' profile to handle source and javadoc jar attachment specifically for release builds.
Update the project artifact ID, version, and license year to reflect the new release cycle.
